/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/mowbot_sim.dir/main.cpp.o -o mowbot_sim  /opt/homebrew/lib/libBulletDynamics.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libBulletCollision.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libLinearMath.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libBulletSoftBody.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/raylib/5.5/lib/libraylib.dylib -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/raylib/5.5/lib -lraylib
